case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. WILSON KONG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, WILSON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.50) SERVED MAY-11-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, WILSON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS/ SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONG, WILSON $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
